title: Morales and MacCreedy
description: Back-to-back movie marathon of classic Morales and MacCreedy. One day, Detective Morales gets assigned a new partner, Duncan MacCreedy, and everything changes.
quote: Don’t ye go dyin’ on me, Morales!
altHero: Morales, a blonde woman, with MacCreedy, a red-haird Scottish man in traditional garb
alt1: MacCreedy blowing bullets from a bagpipe
alt2: MacCreedy kicks open an office door, startling Morales
alt3: Morales talks to MacCreedy who has blank green eyes
alt4: Morales and MacCreedy with a baby riding a pterodactyl
